title: Front Office Manager - Goa Tourism - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Goa Tourism - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Goa Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Goa Tourism:
Goa Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism!
